name: Grayanotoxin

positive: Brightness alteration  - Grayanotoxin may make colors appear darker.
Cognitive euphoria - This effect manifests as a sense of relaxation
neutral: Drifting - This effect is qualitatively similar to that of other cholinergic substances, and is likely a result of the effects of grayanotoxins on sodium channels.
negative: External hallucination - Deliriant-like hallucinations have been reported after high-dose ingestion of grayanotoxins, this is rarely reported and is unlikely to occur at common doses.
Sleepiness - At sufficient doses, grayanotoxins may cause sedation and even a sudden loss of consciousness .
Anxiety suppression - Grayanotoxin-containing plants, such as monotropa uniflora, have been historically used for their anxiolytic effects .

legality: Legal status varies by jurisdiction. Check local laws.
history: Information not available in source data.
afterEffects: See route data for afterglow information.
